_README: PROPOSED additions to the orchestrator's shared connection-type vocabulary (types.json). organ-auth introduces an authentication seam that no existing type covers. Per CONNECTORS.md new types are reviewed, not minted freely — these two are submitted for review in the organ-auth PR. Merge them into orchestrator/types.json (feat/drift-gate) under `types` if approved.

LoginAttempt.desc: A submitted login credential to verify against an outstanding one-time code: the email it was sent to, the plaintext code the user entered, the orchestrator-fetched stored code record (null if none on file), and the clock. The impure DB fetch + code generation/email happen at the orchestrator edge; the organ judges the snapshot.

Session.desc: An issued authenticated session descriptor produced by a successful login: who it is for, when it was issued, when it expires, how it was obtained, and that it is authenticated. The orchestrator mints the actual signed cookie from this descriptor.
